messages.content: in the weekly newsletter, how to say in 50 words that we will be focusing on practicing and preparing for the graduation ceremony and the exit point next week? in professional and positive language.

"Our upcoming week will be dedicated to practicing and preparing for the highly anticipated graduation ceremony and our students' exit point. We are excited to culminate their academic journey with a memorable event and instill a sense of accomplishment. Let's make the most of our time to ensure a successful conclusion of this wonderful journey!"

translate into Chinese: Our upcoming week will be dedicated to practicing and preparing for the highly anticipated graduation ceremony and the exit point of IEYC unit Animal Rescuers. We are excited to culminate their academic journey with a memorable event and instill a sense of accomplishment. Let’s make the most of our time to ensure a successful conclusion of this wonderful journey!
我们接下来的一周将专注于为备受期待的毕业典礼和IEYC《动物救援者》单元退出点进行练习和准备。我们为将他们的学术之旅以难忘的事件达到顶峰并激发成就感而感到兴奋。让我们充分利用时间，确保这个美好旅程的成功结束！
K2 children are excited to culminate their academic journey with a memorable event and instill a sense of accomplishment.  translate into chinese
K2的孩子们为将他们的学术之旅以难忘的事件达到顶峰，并激发成就感而感到兴奋。

Dear Parents:
The annual grand end-of-school celebration is about to be held, with the theme of Let Your Dream Set Sail. Our children have made a lot of preparations and efforts for this event. Parents are invited to witness the growth and progress of their children together.
translate into chinese

亲爱的家长们：

即将到来的年度校庆盛典主题为“让你的梦想起航”。我们的孩子们为这一活动做了很多准备和努力。特邀请家长们共同见证孩子们的成长与进步。

We have come to the end of another successful year. We are so happy to see the growth of all the kids in K2 and are excited to see what K3 has in store for them. Here is a review of the last month of the semester. 

We started off with a very fun Children’s Day celebration. The kids practiced hard to put on an excellent performance of the song version of The Tortoise and the Hare. All of the students sang their hearts out and we were all proud of their efforts. After the performance, everyone enjoyed the games put on by each year level. We even were lucky enough to have Lucky the Lizard for the kids to pet thanks to Naomi and her mom. 
 translate into chinese

我们又度过了一个成功的学年。我们非常高兴看到K2所有孩子的成长，并期待看到K3为他们带来的惊喜。这里是本学期最后一个月的回顾。

我们以一个非常有趣的儿童节庆祝活动开始了。孩子们努力练习，为龟兔赛跑的歌曲版本表演出色。所有学生都用心歌唱，我们都为他们的努力感到自豪。演出后，每个年级都举办了游戏活动，每个孩子们都玩得很开心。我们甚至因为Naomi和她的妈妈而有幸拥有了可爱的蜥蜴Lucky，孩子们可以去抚摸它。

The performance of the Tortoise and the Hare was also a huge success at the art museum. For many it was their first time to perform in such a large venue with so many people. With brave hearts, they took to the stage and performed wonderfully. After the song the audience showed their appreciation with a thunderous applause that painted smiles on all the little ones faces.  translate into chinese
《龟兔赛跑》的表演在艺术博物馆也取得了巨大的成功。对于许多孩子来说，这是他们第一次在如此众多观众面前在这样的大场合演出。他们勇敢地走上舞台，表现得非常出色。歌曲演唱后，观众们发出了雷鸣般的掌声，这让所有小朋友们脸上都洋溢着笑容，表达了他们的欣赏之情。

Our Exit Point to the IEYC unit Animal Rescuers was a massive hit. The kids put their knowledge of the arctic, desert, savannah, and jungles to produce very cool shoe box dioramas. They used materials provided by their teachers to make the shoe boxes come to life with different vegetation and animals. After, they talked about their habitat in English and Chinese to the parents that joined us that day.  translate into chinese
我们为IEYC《动物救援者》单元的退出点感到非常成功。孩子们利用他们在北极、沙漠、草原和丛林的知识，制作出非常酷的鞋盒景观。他们利用老师提供的材料，让鞋盒通过不同的植物和动物呈现出生动的场景。之后，他们用英语和中文向当天加入我们的家长讲述了他们的栖息地。

We were hard at work perfecting our performance of The Very Hungry Caterpillar for the graduation ceremony. Again, the kids took to the stage and put on a fantastic show. They performance they put on should make teachers, parents, and the kids themselves very proud.  into chinese
我们为毕业典礼而努力完善我们对《饥饿的毛毛虫》的表演。孩子们再次走上舞台，呈现出一场精彩的表演。他们的表演使老师、家长和孩子们自己都感到非常自豪。

K2 teachers are always happy to get to chat with parents and family members for the year end meetings. These meetings are a great way to review the wonderful year had by their kids. We would like to thank all of the K2 families for working side by side with us to make the year as productive as possible so each child can reach their full potential. We would also like to thank Elton’s mom and Cecilia’s mom for being our parents rep. It has been a year of many challenges, and your help was very much appreciated. into chinese
K2老师们总是很高兴能够与家长和家庭成员进行年终会议交流。这些会议是回顾孩子们美好的一年的绝佳方式。我们要感谢所有的K2家庭，与我们并肩努力，让这一年尽可能地具有生产力，以使每个孩子都能实现他们的全部潜力。我们还要感谢Elton的妈妈和Cecilia的妈妈成为我们的家长代表。这一年有很多挑战，我们非常感谢你们的帮助。
We wish everyone a fun and safe summer break and can’t wait to see you all in K3! into chinese
我们祝愿大家度过一个快乐而安全的暑假，并迫不及待地想要在K3见到大家！
write a short welcome email to send to summer camp parents. 100 words

Dear Parents,

We are delighted to welcome your child to our summer camp program. We have an exciting week planned with a range of fun activities and educational opportunities, designed to ensure that your child has a memorable experience. Our dedicated and experienced team will provide a safe and nurturing environment in which your child can learn and grow, while making new friends and having a fantastic time. Please feel free to contact us if you have any questions or concerns, and we are looking forward to seeing your child soon.

Best regards,

[Your name]
